category.scope_note: Particulate respirators and face masks (surgical masks, N95, KN95, surgical N95) — China-to-US compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-US PPE Respirator & Mask Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩及呼吸器进入美国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩及呼吸器進入美國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese GB 2626 KN95 and medical mask documentation against US NIOSH 42 CFR Part 84 approval, FDA 510(k) clearance, OSHA 29 CFR 1910.134 workplace requirements, labelling obligations, and market-access prerequisites. Covers industrial respirators, surgical masks, and surgical N95s.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国GB 2626 KN95及医用口罩文件与美国NIOSH 42 CFR第84部分审批、FDA 510(k)许可、OSHA 29 CFR 1910.134工作场所要求、标签义务及市场准入前提条件的差距对照，涵盖工业呼吸器、外科口罩及外科N95。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國GB 2626 KN95及醫用口罩文件與美國NIOSH 42 CFR第84部分審批、FDA 510(k)許可、OSHA 29 CFR 1910.134工作場所要求、標籤義務及市場准入前提條件的差距對照，涵蓋工業呼吸器、外科口罩及外科N95。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a regulatory determination, certification decision, legal opinion, NIOSH approval, FDA clearance, OSHA compliance assessment, or customs ruling. Manufacturers, exporters, importers, and employers should verify current US federal regulations, NIOSH approval requirements, FDA guidance, and OSHA standards with qualified regulatory professionals before manufacturing, importing, or deploying respiratory protective equipment in the United States.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成监管裁定、认证结论、法律意见、NIOSH审批、FDA许可、OSHA合规评估或海关裁定。制造商、出口商、进口商及雇主在美国制造、进口或使用呼吸防护装备前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行美国联邦法规、NIOSH审批要求、FDA指南及OSHA标准。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成監管裁定、認證結論、法律意見、NIOSH審批、FDA許可、OSHA合規評估或海關裁定。製造商、出口商、進口商及僱主在美國製造、進口或使用呼吸防護裝備前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行美國聯邦法規、NIOSH審批要求、FDA指南及OSHA標準。

answer_first.en: Chinese KN95 certification (GB 2626) is NOT equivalent to US NIOSH N95 approval (42 CFR Part 84) — there is no mutual recognition, and COVID-era EUAs permitting KN95 imports have expired. All particulate respirators sold or used in US workplaces must carry a NIOSH TC approval number. Surgical masks and surgical N95s additionally require FDA 510(k) clearance and FDA establishment registration. A US-registered entity must hold the NIOSH approval.
answer_first.zh: 中国KN95认证（GB 2626）不等同于美国NIOSH N95审批（42 CFR第84部分）——两者之间无相互认可协议，允许进口KN95的新冠EUA已到期。在美国工作场所销售或使用的所有颗粒物呼吸器须持有NIOSH TC审批编号。外科口罩和外科N95还须额外获得FDA 510(k)许可和FDA机构注册。NIOSH审批须由美国注册实体持有。
answer_first.zht: 中國KN95認證（GB 2626）不等同於美國NIOSH N95審批（42 CFR第84部分）——兩者之間無相互認可協議，允許進口KN95的新冠EUA已到期。在美國工作場所銷售或使用的所有顆粒物呼吸器須持有NIOSH TC審批編號。外科口罩和外科N95還須額外獲得FDA 510(k)許可和FDA機構註冊。NIOSH審批須由美國註冊實體持有。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official US federal regulator (CDC/NIOSH, FDA, OSHA, eCFR), standards body, or primary legal source preferred. No local PDFs or secondary summaries.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. EUA status must be re-verified on each update cycle — EUAs can expire or be revised.
